features: Silky Smooth: With added argan oil, Astonish conditioner leaves hair soft and silky
For everyone: Astonish conditioner is dermatologically tested and suitable for a range of hair types
Fruity Fragrance: The peach scent will leave hair smelling tropical all day long
Fully-recyclable: Good for your hair and the environment, encased in 100% recyclable packaging
Vegan & Cruelty Free: At Astonish, we are proud that all our products are 100% vegan and completely animal cruelty free, giving you peace of mind
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution even personal care. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can on occasions be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Astonish Tropical Conditioner is delightfully filled with refreshing scents to cleanse and nourish your hair through a fruity peach fragrance. With added argan oil to aid nourishment, this tropical conditioner will leave your hair feeling soft, revitalised and silky. Ingredients Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerol, Sodium Benzoate, Behentrimonium Chloride, Hexadecyltrimethyl ammonium chloride, Isopropanol, Linalool, gamma-Undecalactone, Ethylene dodecanedioate, Benzyl acetate, 2,6-dimethyloct-7-en-2-ol, Allylcyclohexanepropionate, Allyl Heptylate, 4-Methyl-3-decen-5-ol, Tartrazine 400%, alpha-Pinene, Allyl hexanoate, Gamma-Terpinene, dl-Citronellol, Citral, Geraniol, Benzyl salicylate. Directions After shampooing, apply a generous amount (around 375ml) to hair, massage into hair, leave for a few minutes, and then rinse out. Safety Warning Inhalation: remove to fresh air. Eye contact: rinse thoroughly with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes, lifting lower and upper eyelids. Consult a physician. Skin contact: wash skin with soap and water. In the case of skin irritation or allergic reactions see a physician. Ingestion: rinse mouth. Manufacturer Contact Information Manufactured by: The London Oil Refining Co. Ltd., Bradford, BD3 7AF, UK. EU: Advena Ltd., Tower Business Centre, 2nd Floor, Tower Street, Swatar, BKR 4013, Malta. See more
